steps.title: Identify the shared characteristic
steps.content: Both Ephydra cinerea and Coccochloris live in the southern portion of the Great Salt Lake according to the notes. This shared location is the similarity that can be emphasized.

steps.title: Select the answer that emphasizes the similarity
steps.content: Choice B emphasizes this similarity directly by naming both organisms together and explicitly stating they “both live in the southern portion.” The other choices either focus on the lake's characteristics or mention only one organism. This matches choice B — B is correct.
